evidence: Confirmed the official AWS service documentation classification and one independently reviewable documented-fact claim.
Compared the new premise with the approved generic RAM ownership, principal, permission-ceiling, and Region claims; no contradiction found.
Retained non-default-subnet, same-organization, and AWS RAM organization-sharing qualifications and excluded outside-organization and default-subnet cases.
Checked the official prerequisite and working-with-shared-subnets sections for cases that would make the statement overbroad; the recorded limitations bound the claim.
The record is a documented fact, not a derived recommendation; no recommendation premise is asserted.
Recorded currentness, account/configuration conditions, and Region sensitivity; validity ends 2026-08-19 unless triggered sooner.
Reopened the official AWS VPC subnet-sharing page and its prerequisite and sharing sections on 2026-07-20.

artifact_checks.notes: Exact-digest evidence-boundary audit for the concrete RAM subnet premise.
